title: There are days when I question everything.
hook: There are days when I question everything.
caption:
There are days when I question everything.

The early mornings.
The empty stomach.
The cardio.
The same meals.
The constant saying “no” to things everyone else enjoys.

Sometimes I ask myself,
“Is this really worth it?”

Then I remember why I started.

This was never about looking better than someone else.
It was about becoming someone I couldn’t recognize a year ago.

Every hard day is a test.
Every workout is a vote for the person I want to become.

The stage doesn’t build champions.
It only reveals the work no one saw.

ICN Goa.
I’m not chasing a medal.
I’m chasing the best version of mysel

title: A real body transformation is not built by chasing the lowest number on the scale. It is built by managing each phase correctly.
hook: A real body transformation is not built by chasing the lowest number on the scale. It is built by managing each phase correctly.
caption:
A real body transformation is not built by chasing the lowest number on the scale. It is built by managing each phase correctly.

Ali’s journey started at approximately 87 kg. Over several structured phases, we reduced body fat, improved his waistline, preserved muscle mass, and developed a noticeably stronger V-taper through his shoulders, arms, and back.

The process included an initial reset and stabilization phase, progressive fat-loss blocks, targeted resistance training, controlled cardio, planned refeeds, and later adjustments to improve recovery, muscle fullness, digestion, and trainin

title: The difference wasn’t motivation. It was adherence.
hook: The difference wasn’t motivation. It was adherence.
caption:
12 weeks apart.

The difference wasn’t motivation. It was adherence.

Calories tracked. Training logged. Cardio done. Sleep prioritised. Repeat.

Most people overestimate what they can do in 2 weeks and underestimate what they can do in 12 when they stop looking for shortcuts.

And yes, the food scale became my personality for a while.

That same process is what I coach clients through: simple, repeatable habits that actually produce results.

#Bodybuilding #PrepLife #OnlineCoaching #FatLoss #PhysiqueTransformation

title: 4 Biceps Exercises You Need for Bigger Arms 💪
hook: 4 Biceps Exercises You Need for Bigger Arms 💪
caption:
4 Biceps Exercises You Need for Bigger Arms 💪
You don't need 15 different biceps exercises.
These 4 movements are enough if you execute them correctly:
✔️ Barbell Curl – Build overall size
✔️ Incline Dumbbell Curl – Stretch the long head
✔️ Hammer Curl – Target the brachialis & forearms
✔️ Concentration Curl – Improve mind-muscle connection
The biggest mistake?
Most people swing the weight instead of training the muscle.
👉 Keep your upper arm stable.
👉 Move only from the elbow joint.
👉 Control every rep and squeeze your biceps at the top.
Remember:
Don't just lift the weight. Make your biceps

title: Jada @jadalewisfp has been with me since before @foxdenfitclub opened its doors. I needed trainers on my staff and thought she was a great fit. She didn’t know
hook: Jada @jadalewisfp has been with me since before @foxdenfitclub opened its doors. I needed trainers on my staff and thought she was a great fit. She didn’t know
caption:
Jada @jadalewisfp has been with me since before @foxdenfitclub opened its doors. I needed trainers on my staff and thought she was a great fit. She didn’t know me but she believed in the vision, held out for us to open, and somehow we’ve been stuck with each other ever since. 😂❤️

In a lot of ways, we’re opposites. She loves dark, rainy days, hoodies, and is just generally chill. I love bright colors, sunny summer days, and being aggressively enthusiastic at times. She doesn’t like chocolate OR peanut butter, so clearly I’ve had to overlook some major character flaws. 😜 

But where it matters,

title: They say bodybuilding is an individual sport.
hook: They say bodybuilding is an individual sport.
caption:
They say bodybuilding is an individual sport.

But no one gets here alone.

To my kids, thank you for reminding me what matters most. The medals are special, but being your dad means more ❤️

To my family, friends and everyone who supported me throughout this journey, thank you for standing by me through every high and low.

This prep ended with more than I ever expected:

🏆 INB

title: My go-to vacation “I can enjoy this and not feel like I ate a caloric gut-bomb” pick is a grilled chicken sandwich. Yes, I’ll even get it with cheese and bacon
hook: My go-to vacation “I can enjoy this and not feel like I ate a caloric gut-bomb” pick is a grilled chicken sandwich. Yes, I’ll even get it with cheese and bacon
caption:
My go-to vacation “I can enjoy this and not feel like I ate a caloric gut-bomb” pick is a grilled chicken sandwich. Yes, I’ll even get it with cheese and bacon if I’m feeling saucy.
-
Is this the BEST option? I’d say that’s context-dependent, but in general, probably not. However, my travel approach is typically to keep meals earlier in the day as low carb and low fat as possible in order to ensure I don’t blow out my macros when we inevitably eat out for dinner.
-
I went into dinner tonight (second pic) with about 15 g fat and 50 g carbs for the entire day, so I had the flexibility to enjoy s

title: I’m an OCB Bikini Pro—meaning I earned my professional status competing in a 100% natural, drug-tested bodybuilding federation.
hook: I’m an OCB Bikini Pro—meaning I earned my professional status competing in a 100% natural, drug-tested bodybuilding federation.
caption:
I’m an OCB Bikini Pro—meaning I earned my professional status competing in a 100% natural, drug-tested bodybuilding federation.

I’m also a Certified Holistic Nutritionist and Women’s Fitness Specialist.

And here’s something that surprises a lot of people...
I don’t fear carbs.

In fact, I intentionally eat them every single day (285g to be exact) because I understand what they actually do for the female body.

One of the biggest misconceptions I hear from women is:
“Carbs make you gain fat.”

The truth? Your body is incredibly smart.

Carbohydrates are first used for energy or stored as glyc

title: Day 1 of my 6-week intermittent fasting reset is officially in the books!
hook: Day 1 of my 6-week intermittent fasting reset is officially in the books!
caption:
Day 1 Down! ✅🔥

Day 1 of my 6-week intermittent fasting reset is officially in the books!

Today wasn’t about being perfect, it was about being consistent.

✔️ Fasted until 10:00 AM
✔️ Followed my 10:00 AM–6:00 PM eating window
✔️ Hit my protein goals
✔️ Made smart grocery choices
✔️ Finished the day with a balanced meal

Dinner:
🐟 ~4–5 oz salmon
🍗 ~3–4 oz boneless chicken thighs
🥬 Sautéed spinach with red peppers
🍚 ~½ cup brown rice & quinoa blend

I’m locking in for the next six weeks. No shortcuts. No excuses. Just showing up every day and stacking small wins.

235… I’m coming for you. 💪🏾🔥

title: Over the past year, this Veteran trusted my process with his nutrition, training, and accountability. We trained hard. Some days once, some days twice, and even
hook: Over the past year, this Veteran trusted my process with his nutrition, training, and accountability. We trained hard. Some days once, some days twice, and even
caption:
Over the past year, this Veteran trusted my process with his nutrition, training, and accountability. We trained hard. Some days once, some days twice, and even three sessions. Every cardio session got done. Every meal mattered. Every workout was another brick laid toward becoming a stronger, healthier version of himself.

In your 50s, building muscle and losing body fat isn’t easy. It requires patience, commitment, and refusing to quit. That’s exactly what he did.

title: Half of the day sa work—almost done na…
hook: Half of the day sa work—almost done na…
caption:
This is 46.  #nofilter 
Working wife. 
Half of the day sa work—almost done na…
pero HIGH ENERGY pa din at good mood! 

Hindi na ako yung dating pagod, drained, at naghahanap ng kape every few hours. 

Because now… I have my daily secret.
Unimate Yerba Mate Tea

Hindi lang ako nag lose weight…
gumaan ang pakiramdam ko
mas clear ang mind ko
glowing kahit 46 na (sabi nila 😂)
at positive vibes lang lagi kahit busy ang day

Imagine… matapos mo yung shift mo na hindi ubos ang energy mo. 

That’s what I’m experiencing EVERY DAY.

If you’re a busy working woman like me na gusto:
✔ more energy
✔ better
